text: The atmosphere here feels silent and heavy, as if anticipation hangs in the air. The stark artificial lights clash with deep shadows. I am struck by a sense of solitude and perhaps a little foreboding, as if I’ve stumbled into an unused corridor where time seems to slow down. The mention of research and development on the wall stirs curiosity in me—what discoveries or secrets lie within these walls? Yet, I also feel a disconnect, like I am on the threshold of something undisclosed, not quite belonging here.
